allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix: Implement password reset email notifications

- Add EmailNotificationService to AuthService for sending emails
- Send password reset email with reset link when user requests reset
- Send confirmation email after successful password reset
- Improve reset logic to search across all tenants by email
- Remove hardcoded tenant ID from password reset flow

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
chore: Remove TODO in BenefitManagementService

- Replace TODO comment with clarification that Provider entity is not implemented
- BenefitPlanEnhanced should be used for plans requiring provider details

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add Twilio SMS notification integration with mock mode

- Add TwilioConfig for SMS configuration with mock mode support
- Create SmsNotificationService with Twilio SDK integration
- Add SmsNotificationController with single/bulk SMS endpoints
- Create SMS DTOs \(SmsNotificationRequest, SmsNotificationResponse, BulkSmsRequest\)
- Integrate SmsNotificationService with MultiChannelNotificationService
- Add Twilio SDK dependency to pom.xml
- Add Twilio configuration to application.yml

Mock mode enabled by default - set TWILIO_MOCK_MODE=false with
valid credentials to send real SMS.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code]\(https://claude.com/claude-code\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(/tmp/create_test_user.sql <<'EOF'
-- Create a test user for Google OAuth login
-- This user is for the @nulogic.io email that you're testing with

-- NuLogic tenant ID \(hardcoded in AuthService\)
DO $
DECLARE
    nulogic_tenant_id UUID := '660e8400-e29b-41d4-a716-446655440001';
    test_user_email VARCHAR := 'your-email@nulogic.io'; -- REPLACE THIS WITH YOUR ACTUAL EMAIL
    test_user_id UUID := gen_random_uuid\(\);
BEGIN
    -- Create user if not exists
    INSERT INTO users \(
        id,
        tenant_id,
        email,
        full_name,
        is_active,
        created_at,
        updated_at,
        is_deleted
    \) VALUES \(
        test_user_id,
        nulogic_tenant_id,
        test_user_email,
        'Test User', -- You can change this
        true,
        NOW\(\),
        NOW\(\),
        false
    \) ON CONFLICT \(email, tenant_id\) DO NOTHING;
    
    RAISE NOTICE 'User created with ID: %', test_user_id;
END $;
EOF)
